name: Fillets Stuffed with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 6 Fresh sole or orange roughy - fillets cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. In a 13x9 baking pan, melt the butter.
3. Stir in garlic and basil with chopped green onions.
4. Dip both sides of fillet halves into seasoned butter.
5. Set half of the fillets aside and arrange the other half in the pan.
6. Layer with 2-3 slices of cheese and 1 slice of tomato.
7. Place the remaining fillet halves on top and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake for 25-35 minutes, or until the fish flakes.
